inputs.rowSource: motion-trace-alignment.csv rows joined to trace.csv by traceSequence

training.capBehavior: full train split used for every seed

specs.TrainingTarget: event-safe target; post-stop and stationary labels pull to zero displacement; full train split multi-seed validation
specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, CPU multi-seed focused validation

conclusionHints.deploymentGate: Held-out test normal visual p95/p99 must not regress; held-out test normal-moving futureLag p95 must be within 0.05 px or 5% relative of product and p99 within 0.10 px or 5% relative; robustness peakLead/OTR/returnMotion, futureLead p99, and held-out stationary jitter must not regress.
